analysisRuntime.promptTitle: An analysis runtime component is available
analysisRuntime.promptBody: This computer supports using {title} to accelerate BPM/grid analysis, dual-track horizontal browse, and stem separation. You can download this component ({size}) now. Until it is installed, those features stay unavailable.
analysisRuntime.promptHint: If GitHub is unreachable from the current network, try enabling a VPN or make sure the system proxy / PAC is applied to FRKB.
analysisRuntime.downloadBlockingHint: BPM/grid analysis, dual-track horizontal browse, and stem separation stay unavailable until setup finishes.
analysisRuntime.downloadInProgressTitleGeneric: The analysis runtime is being prepared
analysisRuntime.downloadInProgressHint: The analysis runtime is currently downloading or extracting. This feature stays unavailable until it finishes.
analysisRuntime.downloadInProgressProgressHint: Check the bottom progress bar, or click 'View download' to reopen the download window.
analysisRuntime.extractingText: Download complete. Extracting and validating the runtime...
analysisRuntime.readyHint: {title} is ready. Future BPM/grid analysis, dual-track horizontal browse, and stem separation will use this runtime automatically.
analysisRuntime.unsupportedHint: This computer does not currently support a downloadable analysis runtime. BPM/grid analysis, dual-track horizontal browse, and stem separation are unavailable.
analysisRuntime.manifestUnavailableHint: Unable to fetch the analysis runtime manifest. This is usually caused by network, GitHub access, or proxy configuration issues.
analysisRuntime.downloadFailedHint: Failed to download the analysis runtime. BPM/grid analysis, dual-track horizontal browse, and stem separation are unavailable right now.
analysisRuntime.horizontalBlockedHint: Dual-track horizontal browse is unavailable until the analysis runtime is installed.
analysisRuntime.helpButtonHint: Download this runtime to enable BPM/grid analysis, dual-track horizontal browse, and stem separation.
